## What this does

Briefly, what changes and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` is clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets` has no warnings
- [ ] `cargo check --workspace` passes
- [ ] App boots and the change works (no panics)
- [ ] No hardcoded endpoints/keys; any new assets are license-cleared
- [ ] `vrm_stage_core` stays generic (app/provider code lives in the binary crate)
